rationale_or_action: Below threshold mark insufficient_cells; do not create pseudobulk or encode zero expression
Below threshold mark cell type not_estimable for that iteration; do not count as reversal
Lower coverage remains descriptive or Supplementary
Report same-direction estimable iterations / all estimable iterations and estimable iterations / 11
Do not change thresholds after inspecting cell-type coverage or program effects
All three atlases must show the same direction; one discordant atlas means inconsistency and moves the cellular layer to Supplementary
